paper_title: Materials and Methodology of Miocene Evaporate Succession Study

methods.description: Conducting lithofacies analysis in the field based on systematic classification of gypsum/anhydrite.

steps.description: Lithofacies analysis is conducted in the field based on systematic classification of gypsum/anhydrite by Holliday (1971) and comparison with classifications of other studies.
steps.searchable_summary: perform lithofacies classification of gypsum/anhydrite in the field

methods.description: Petrographic investigation using traditional petrographic microscopy to analyze the samples.

steps.description: Petrographic investigation using traditional petrographic microscopy are achieved at the Geology Department of Mosul University, Iraq.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct petrographic microscopy analysis on samples

methods.description: Using scanning electron microscopy (SEM) for detailed textural and diagenetic identification.

steps.description: A deeply focusing of textural and diagenetic identification using scanning electron microscopy (SEM) was conducted on selected samples using Camscan MV 2300 SEM at Steinmann Institute, Bonn University, Germany.
steps.searchable_summary: perform SEM analysis for textural and diagenetic identification

methods.description: Conducting mineralogical analysis using X-ray diffraction (XRD) to determine mineral composition.

steps.description: Mineralogical XRD analysis using D8 ADVANCE [Bruker AXS] with Cu-∞radiation conducted at Steinmann Institute, Bonn University, Germany.
steps.searchable_summary: perform XRD analysis to determine mineral composition

methods.description: Conducting geochemical analysis using X-ray fluorescence (XRF) to determine elemental composition.

steps.description: Geochemical analysis using Siemens SRS 303 XRF conducted at Steinmann Institute, Bonn University, Germany.
steps.searchable_summary: perform XRF analysis to determine elemental composition

methods.description: Measuring porosity and permeability using dimension measurement and wax method for porosity, and pipette method for permeability.

steps.description: Porosity measurements conducted using dimension measurement and wax method using Soxlith instrument after bitumen extraction.
steps.searchable_summary: measure porosity using dimension and wax method

steps.description: Permeability measurements conducted using the pipette method.
